title: Residency tests
description: Work out if you're an Australian resident or a foreign resident for tax purposes using the residency tests.
keywords: residency tests, resides test, domicile test, 183 day test, superannuation tests, resident examples, foreign resident, foreign resident examples

child_links.title: Residency - the resides test
child_links.description: The resides test is the primary test for working out if you're a resident of Australia for tax purposes.

child_links.description: The domicile test is one of the tests used to determine if you're a resident of Australia for tax purposes.

child_links.title: Residency – the 183-day test
child_links.description: The 183-day test is one of the tests used to determine if you are a resident of Australia for tax purposes.

child_links.title: Residency – the superannuation test
child_links.description: The superannuation test is one of the tests used to determine if you are a resident of Australia for tax purposes.

child_links.title: Australian and foreign resident examples
child_links.description: These examples may help you determine whether you are a resident of Australia for income tax purposes.
